mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_transactions ( stock_id, transaction_type, from_space_id, from_shelf_id, from_box_id, to_space_id, to_shelf_id, to_box_id, memo ) VALUES ( #{stockId}, #{transactionType}, #{fromSpaceId}, #{fromShelfId}, #{fromBoxId}, #{toSpaceId}, #{toShelfId}, #{toBoxId}, #{memo} )

INSERT INTO stock_transactions ( stock_id, transaction_type, from_space_id, from_shelf_id, from_box_id, to_space_id, to_shelf_id, to_box_id, memo ) VALUES
(#{t.stockId}, #{t.transactionType}, #{t.fromSpaceId}, #{t.fromShelfId}, #{t.fromBoxId}, #{t.toSpaceId}, #{t.toShelfId}, #{t.toBoxId}, #{t.memo})
mapper.select: SELECT id, external_id, stock_id, transaction_type, from_space_id, from_shelf_id, from_box_id, to_space_id, to_shelf_id, to_box_id, memo, created_at FROM stock_transactions WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, external_id, stock_id, transaction_type, from_space_id, from_shelf_id, from_box_id, to_space_id, to_shelf_id, to_box_id, memo, created_at FROM stock_transactions WHERE stock_id = #{stockId} ORDER BY created_at

SELECT TRIM(st.memo) AS memo FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks s ON st.stock_id = s.id JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND st.transaction_type = #{transactionType} AND st.memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(st.memo) != '' AND TRIM(st.memo) NOT IN ('초기 등록', '빠른 등록') GROUP BY TRIM(st.memo) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, MAX(st.created_at) DESC, TRIM(st.memo) LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT st.external_id AS transaction_external_id, st.transaction_type, st.memo, st.created_at, s.external_id AS stock_external_id, s.serial_number, s.lot_number, s.status, sp.name AS space_name, sh.name AS shelf_name, b.name AS box_name, from_sp.name AS from_space_name, from_sh.name AS from_shelf_name, from_b.name AS from_box_name, to_sp.name AS to_space_name, to_sh.name AS to_shelf_name, to_b.name AS to_box_name FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks s ON st.stock_id = s.id JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id JOIN spaces sp ON s.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves sh ON s.shelf_id = sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes b ON s.box_id = b.id LEFT JOIN spaces from_sp ON st.from_space_id = from_sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves from_sh ON st.from_shelf_id = from_sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes from_b ON st.from_box_id = from_b.id LEFT JOIN spaces to_sp ON st.to_space_id = to_sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves to_sh ON st.to_shelf_id = to_sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes to_b ON st.to_box_id = to_b.id WHERE i.external_id = #{itemExternalId, typeHandler=com.seu.seustock.configuration.UUIDTypeHandler} AND i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY st.created_at DESC

SELECT st.external_id AS transaction_external_id, st.transaction_type, st.memo, st.created_at, s.external_id AS stock_external_id, s.serial_number, s.lot_number, s.status, sp.name AS space_name, sh.name AS shelf_name, b.name AS box_name, from_sp.name AS from_space_name, from_sh.name AS from_shelf_name, from_b.name AS from_box_name, to_sp.name AS to_space_name, to_sh.name AS to_shelf_name, to_b.name AS to_box_name FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks s ON st.stock_id = s.id JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id JOIN spaces sp ON s.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves sh ON s.shelf_id = sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes b ON s.box_id = b.id LEFT JOIN spaces from_sp ON st.from_space_id = from_sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves from_sh ON st.from_shelf_id = from_sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes from_b ON st.from_box_id = from_b.id LEFT JOIN spaces to_sp ON st.to_space_id = to_sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves to_sh ON st.to_shelf_id = to_sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes to_b ON st.to_box_id = to_b.id WHERE s.external_id = #{stockExternalId, typeHandler=com.seu.seustock.configuration.UUIDTypeHandler} AND i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY st.created_at, st.id
